home.title: Galactic Cruise Solo Helper
home.play1: Play a Galactic Cruise solo game against Rachel, the solo opponent.
home.play2: This application replaces the solo card deck and guides you through the game flow.

gameBoard.title: Game Board
gameBoard.twoPlayerGame: Set up the game for a 2-player game.
gameBoard.neutralDevelopments: Place the neutral Developments in these areas, covering the Reputation icon:
gameBoard.npcWorkers: Place 2 NPC Workers on this locations:

bot.title: Rachel
bot.playerBoard: Rachel receives a Player Board and sets up all the usual pieces that a player would use. She does NOT need Resource trackers and always uses the base game Upgrade Tokens.
bot.reputation: She will be the 2nd player, so place her Reputation tracker on the “1” space of the Reputation Track.

soloTokens.title: Place the Solo Tokens (Rachel's Company Goal threshold reminders) on the appropriate spaces:

development.7: Place this onto her rightmost Fuel Development.
development.6: Place this onto her middle Fuel Development.
development.5: Place this onto her leftmost Fuel Development.

soloTokens.segment: Place this around the area where Rachel's Segment #{segment} will be built.
soloTokens.ship: Place this above the area where Rachel's Ship #{ship} will be.

bot.soloWorkerCard: Place the Solo Worker Card of your chosen difficulty next to the Action Cards (this will help you to remember to Call a Meeting if she has no Workers). This is her Break Room—place her Workers here instead of on her Player Board.
bot.firstDevelopment: Rachel places her first Development (from the Food row) in the Network. This placement must be in an area with no other Developments as usual.

turnPlayer.title: Player
turnPlayer.lastRoundInfo: Last Round: Rachel and you return all Workers from the Network to the Break Room, gaining a Funding Bonus as usual.

instructions.progressScoring: Execute the progress scoring for Section {round} for Rachel and yourself.
instructions.skipIfColorExists: If there is already a Development of that color in the depicted area, skip that placement.
instructions.replaceFirstWorker: Replace one NPC Worker with one NPC Expert Worker.
instructions.chooseClosestWorker: Choose the NPC Worker closest to the top middle location going clockwise.
instructions.replaceSecondWorker: Replace the other NPC Worker with an NPC Expert Worker.

endGameTriggered.title: The end of the game is triggered.
endGameTriggered.finishCurrentRound: The current round is finished, and then a final round is played.
endGameTriggered.nextRoundFinalRound: The next round is the final round.

endRoundConfirm.1: If the last cube was placed on progress track 1, Annual General Meeting (AGM) A occurs.
endRoundConfirm.2: If the last cube was placed on progress track 2, Annual General Meeting (AGM) B occurs.
endRoundConfirm.3: If the last cube was placed on progress track 3, the end of the game is triggered.

endOfGame.title: End of Game
endOfGame.botCockpitScoring: Rachel scores the VP printed on each Cockpit, plus the VP on each Segment. (-5 VP for any unlaunched Ships.)

returningToEarth.title: Advance Ships: Returning to Earth
returningToEarth.returnWorker: Return the Worker into your Break Room.
returningToEarth.discardCruiseAndGuests: Discard the Cruise and return all Guests to the supply.

destination.placeUpgradeToken: You may place the Upgrade Token on the Destination.
destination.payAdsForGuests: Choose to pay Ads for each guest to score VP.

dayInSpace.gainGuestBonuses: For each Guest, gain their bonus for each matching icon in the Ship.

destination.placeUpgradeToken: If it’s the first Destination of the Cruise, Rachel drops off her Upgrade Token on the leftmost empty space on the Destination, increasing scoring here by 1 VP. Rachel does not unlock or trigger any bonuses from Upgrades.
destination.payAdsForGuests: Then, regardless if it is the first Destination or not, she scores all of her Guests at the Destination. Rachel does not gain/spend Ads to do this.
destination.fourthToken: In the rare case that Rachel would visit the same first Destination four times, she will place the Upgrade Token on the next Destination on that same Cruise. If there are no other Destinations on that Cruise, the token is simply discarded.

dayInSpace.gainGuestBonuses: Rachel gains 1 Reputation for each Guest on the Cruise, regardless of the Guest types.

draw-agenda-cards.title: Draw Agenda Cards
draw-agenda-cards.selection: Rachel will discard the marked agenda cards (or the next ones available).
draw-agenda-cards.minCards: If there are 0 or 1 Agenda Cards in the column, Rachel will not take this action.

refill-agenda-cards.title: Refill Agenda Cards
refill-agenda-cards.reputation: If Reputation is visible in the Agenda Card display, Rachel gains 1 Reputation.
refill-agenda-cards.refill: She then discards all the Agenda Cards in the column top to bottom and refills the spaces from bottom to top with 4 new cards from the top of the Agenda Card deck.

action.abortGameConfirm: Aborting the running game - are you sure?
action.endGameConfirm: End this game and return to home screen - are you sure?

serviceWorkerUpdatedRefresh.title: Refresh Application
serviceWorkerUpdatedRefresh.notice: The application was updated - do you want to refresh to use the latest version?
